BaseDDD.Generation.VersionEnforcementGen.title: Class VersionEnforcementGenerator | BaseDDD
BaseDDD.Generation.VersionEnforcementGen.summary: Class VersionEnforcementGenerator Namespace BaseDDD.Generation Assembly BaseDDD.Cli.dll Generates and migrates the baseddd.json version enforcement file. public class VersionEnforcementGenerator Inheritance object VersionEnforcementGenerator Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Remarks Initializes a new instance of the VersionEnforcementGenerator class. Constructors VersionEnforcementGenerator(string) Generates and migrates the baseddd.json version enforcement file. public VersionEnforcementGenerator(string root) Parameters root string Repository's root. Remarks Initializes a new instance of the VersionEnforcementGenerator class. Methods Check() Reads baseddd.json and checks compatibility against the current tool version. No-ops if baseddd.json does not exist (pre-versioning projects). public void Check() Generate() Generates a fresh baseddd.json at the project root. Fails loudly if one already exists. public void Generate() Migrate(bool) Migrates baseddd.json to the current template version, preserving the original createdAt timestamp. public void Migrate(bool dryRun) Parameters dryRun bool When true, prints the plan without writing anything.

BaseDDD.Infrastructure.MigrationRunner.h.summary: Class MigrationRunner Namespace BaseDDD.Infrastructure Assembly BaseDDD.Cli.dll Chains and executes IMigrationStep instances to bring a project from its current template version up to the tool's current template version. public sealed class MigrationRunner Inheritance object MigrationRunner Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Methods Apply(string, string, string) Applies all required migration steps in order. baseddd.json is written by the caller (VersionEnforcementGenerator) after this returns. public void Apply(string root, string fromVersion, string toVersion) Parameters root string Project root path. fromVersion string Current template version of the project. toVersion string Target template version. Create() Creates a runner pre-registered with all known migration steps. public static MigrationRunner Create() Returns MigrationRunner List of known migrations. DryRun(string, string, string) Prints what would change without applying anything. public void DryRun(string root, string fromVersion, string toVersion) Parameters root string Project root path. fromVersion string Current template version of the project. toVersion string Target template version.

BaseDDD.Migrations.IMigrationStep.html.title: Interface IMigrationStep | BaseDDD
BaseDDD.Migrations.IMigrationStep.html.summary: Interface IMigrationStep Namespace BaseDDD.Migrations Assembly BaseDDD.Cli.dll A single migration step that upgrades a project from one template version to the next. public interface IMigrationStep Properties FromVersion Gets the template version this step migrates from. string FromVersion { get; } Property Value string ToVersion Gets the template version this step migrates to. string ToVersion { get; } Property Value string Methods Apply(string) Applies the migration to the project at the given root. void Apply(string root) Parameters root string Repository's root path. Describe() Returns a human-readable description of every change this step will make. Used for dry-run output. IReadOnlyList<string> Describe() Returns IReadOnlyList<string> List of changes to be applied.
